TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rafer_Alston, title = Rafer_Alston, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rafer_Alston} }

S.FORM: Rafer Alston sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la, p'aras mari' tay suruw. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 7, Rafer Alston, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Rafer Alston sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la, p'aras mari' tay suruw. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 7, Rafer Alston, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ra*er als~ɕton s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la, pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ra*er als~ɕton, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
